name: mentat
description: Live cognitive substrate for Claude Code: a state-machine + TD-learning routing + structured insight bus that runs alongside your session, modeled on the Muad'Dib MCP pattern. Persists across compaction, surfaces scope drift, contradictions, and reward signals in real time. Reflective skills (mentat:reflect, mentat:plan, mentat:dispatch, mentat:debrief) and specialist sub-agents (cartographer, crucible, scribe, sentinel) drive disciplined long autonomous chains.
